## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create date picker, time picker, and date range selector components
- Validate keyboard navigation and screen reader labels
- Use mock hooks to filter datasets by selected range
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Calendar grid 7×6; day cells min 36px
  - Range selection uses distinct start/end emphasis
  - Time picker step 5–15 minutes configurable

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Date/time components reusable and accessible
- [ ] Mock filtering hooks provided
- [ ] Works in both desktop and mobile
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for all pickers

`frontend`, `components`, `date-time`, `priority-high`
